steps.title: Create your stock Proteinase K and RNASE A solutions
steps.instruction: Create your stock Proteinase K and RNASE A solutions. Both at 20mg / mL. So for 100mg of Proteinase K, add 5 mL of molecular water. Same for the RNASE A.

steps.title: Prep your CTAB buffer in 50mL tubes
steps.instruction: Prep your CTAB buffer in 50mL tubes. Add 500 uL of CTAB buffer per sample. 96 samples add 48mL of CTAB. For this amount of CTAB add 240 uL of Proteinase K and 240uL of RNASE A.

steps.title: Place fungal tissue and a stainless...
steps.instruction: Place fungal tissue and a stainless steel bead into a 1.5mL Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 1mL of prewarmed (65◦C) CTAB...
steps.instruction: Add 1mL of prewarmed (65◦C) CTAB extraction buffer with the addition of proteinase K (1 mg/mL) and RNase A (10 mg/mL).

steps.title: Apply three rounds of freeze-thaw consisting...
steps.instruction: Apply three rounds of freeze-thaw consisting of alternating three min treatments in dry ice and a 70uC heating block, followed by a (30 minutes to overnight) incubation at 70◦C.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at max speed
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at max speed.

steps.title: Transfer the liquid phase to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the liquid phase to a new 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 800 µL of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1)
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1). Invert the tube 15 times to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm.

steps.title: Move the upper liquid phase to a new 1
steps.instruction: Move the upper liquid phase to a new 1.5mL tube and add 600 µL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1). Invert the tube 15 times to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm.

steps.title: Precipitate the DNA by adding ice-cold...
steps.instruction: Precipitate the DNA by adding ice-cold isopropanol (2/3 of the recovered volume) and incubate at −20◦C for 2 hours.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm. Pour off isopropanol.

steps.title: Add 300 µL of ice-cold 70% ethanol to wash
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of ice-cold 70% ethanol to wash. Let sit for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 10,000 rpm. Pour off the ethanol.

steps.title: Repeat the previous ethanol wash a second time
steps.instruction: Repeat the previous ethanol wash a second time.

steps.title: Let the pellet air dry for...
steps.instruction: Let the pellet air dry for at least 15 minutes or until all the ethanol has evaporated.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 20uL of molecular water
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 20uL of molecular water. Incubate overnight?

steps.title: Bead cleanup
steps.instruction: Bead cleanup. Add 20uL of beads to the tube. Wait 5 minutes. Put on magnet for 2 minutes. Remove liquid. Add 125mL of ethanol. Wait 2 minutes. Remove ethanol. Repeat wash. Let dry 1 minute.

steps.title: Add 20uL of molecular water
steps.instruction: Add 20uL of molecular water.

steps.title: Store the DNA at -20C
steps.instruction: Store the DNA at -20C.
